properties.Title: MDMA-Oneness Journey Program: Full-Stack Web App Development

text.content: Executive Summary

rich_text.plain_text: Executive Summary

text.content: Yannick requested development of a comprehensive full-stack web application for tracking a year-long MDMA-assisted spiritual awakening journey. Manus built a complete React/Node.js app with four journey phases, interactive timeline, task tracking, integration journal, resources vault, safety protocols, and cosmic spiritual aesthetic. The application includes user authentication, progress persistence, and mobile responsiveness, deployed as a live web service.

rich_text.plain_text: Yannick requested development of a comprehensive full-stack web application for tracking a year-long MDMA-assisted spiritual awakening journey. Manus built a complete React/Node.js app with four journey phases, interactive timeline, task tracking, integration journal, resources vault, safety protocols, and cosmic spiritual aesthetic. The application includes user authentication, progress persistence, and mobile responsiveness, deployed as a live web service.

markdown_content:
## Executive Summary

Yannick requested development of a comprehensive full-stack web application for tracking a year-long MDMA-assisted spiritual awakening journey. Manus built a complete React/Node.js app with four journey phases, interactive timeline, task tracking, integration journal, resources vault, safety protocols, and cosmic spiritual aesthetic. The application includes user authentication, progress persistence, and mobile responsiveness, deployed as a live web service.


## Context & Intent

User wanted a sophisticated web application to guide and track a structured 12-month psychedelic therapy and spiritual awakening program with specific phases, safety protocols, and integration tools.


## What Was Done

Built complete full-stack web application with React frontend, Node.js/Express backend, SQLite database, user authentication, four-phase journey structure (Foundation, Preparation, Deepening, Embodiment), interactive 2026 timeline, task tracking, integration journal, resources vault for retreats and courses, safety section with contraindications, daily rituals tracker, intention setting, progress overview with spiritual quotes, cosmic aesthetic design, mobile responsiveness, testing, deployment, and bug fix for nested anchor tags.


## Outputs Produced

- [web_application] MDMA-Oneness Journey Program — Complete full-stack web app with spiritual aesthetic, user auth, journey tracking, and integration tools
- [live_deployment] Production Web Service — Live URL at https://3000-ivt1hmiryi988086zmscw-1b4e1390.us2.manus.computer
- [database_schema] SQLite Database — Complete data structure for users, tasks, journal entries, rituals, and intentions

## Key Decisions & Validations

- Used React/Node.js stack for full-stack development
- Implemented SQLite for simple data persistence
- Created four-phase journey structure aligned with 2026 timeline
- Integrated safety protocols and harm reduction information
- Applied cosmic spiritual aesthetic with purple/blue/gold palette
- Built mobile-responsive design for accessibility
- Fixed nested anchor tag HTML validation issue

## Lessons Learned

Worked well:

- Comprehensive planning before development execution
- Modular component architecture for complex features
- Integrated testing approach caught database issues early
- Cosmic aesthetic successfully creates immersive spiritual experience
Failed / suboptimal:

- Initial database helper functions didn't return inserted record IDs
- Nested anchor tags in navigation created React warnings
- Some test edge cases remain unresolved but don't affect functionality
Discoveries:

- Wouter Link components already render anchor tags internally
- Complex spiritual journey tracking requires sophisticated state management
- Sacred geometry and cosmic backgrounds enhance user engagement

## Challenges & Blockers

- Database query functions initially failed to return created records with IDs
- React validation errors from nested anchor tag structure
- Balancing comprehensive features with intuitive user experience
- Ensuring mobile responsiveness across all complex interfaces

## Open Questions

- How to best integrate real-time sync across devices for journey data
- What additional safety monitoring features might be needed
- How to handle data backup and export functionality
- Whether to add guided meditation timers with ambient soundscapes

## Next Steps

- Add Swiss clinic integration with contact forms and appointment tracking
- Implement data export functionality for JSON/PDF backup
- Create guided meditation timers with ambient soundscapes
- Add session tracking and time logging for meditation/breathwork
- Build retreat booking integration with calendar widgets
- Create emergency support section with crisis resources
---
UID: AMDfUbOQxO5nPO8WEFWXz8 | Model: claude-sonnet-4-20250514 | Cost: $0.0276
